context: Evaluates the agent's ability to parse standards from a bullet list when no headings are present.

checklist.name: 5 standards parsed from bullet list
checklist.description: Exactly 5 standards are identified from the list items

checklist.name: Paragraph not treated as standard
checklist.description: The introductory text is not included as a standard

checklist.name: One standard per turn
checklist.description: Each standard is presented in its own question call
